case_title: SUSAN HUANG VS. AMERICAN HOME SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF SUSAN HUANG IS PRESENT.
